events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from CPMC Van Ness for client 1011. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 650 mg/meal, carbs 35–70 g/meal. Prefers Mexican; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: stovetop. 10 meals/week, zone Tenderloin.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Veggie Enchiladas
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'cardiovascular': meal lacks 'heart-healthy' tag.

events.title: Rejected: Chicken Pozole Verde
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'cardiovascular': meal lacks 'heart-healthy' tag.

events.title: Matched: Calabacitas con Pollo
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 374/650 mg ✓, carbs 43 g (target 35–70) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Turkey Picadillo with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 440/650 mg ✓, carbs 48 g (target 35–70) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Fajita Bowl
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 450/650 mg ✓, carbs 57 g (target 35–70) ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1011 added to route R-TEND-1 (Tenderloin), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1011: 10 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
